english: to be stuck / to put (something somewhere) / to stick
notes: As an intransitive verb meaning 'to be stuck/located', stecken describes a state (Der Schlüssel steckt im Schloss). As a transitive verb, it means to put/insert something somewhere (Sie steckte den Brief in den Umschlag). The Präteritum 'stak' is archaic/literary; 'steckte' is standard in modern usage.

sentences.english: The key is in the lock.

sentences.german: Sie hat den Zettel in ihre Tasche gesteckt.
sentences.english: She put the note into her bag.

sentences.german: Er steckt den USB-Stick in den Computer.
sentences.english: He plugs the USB stick into the computer.
